Loose Leaf Specialty Teas (Serves Two) |.description: This richly spiced elixir is a complex meritage of Indian Assam in a flavorful dance of hand-ground spices
Our loose-leaf Mountain Berry herbal tea is a fruity superfood blend of Saskatoon berries, currants, hibiscus and rosehips, sealed with sweetness
Grown in the mountains of Assam, this fine leaf tea has a strong full-bodied flavor
Rare osmanthus flowers delicately scent this top-grade high mountain Formosa traditional oolong tea
Fragrant red rose petals and the sweet, sultry flavor of seductive lychee in this rose petal black tea
From the Land of the Thunderbolts, the champagne of black teas
